untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires comparing current bar's open/close to the midpoint of the previous bar's body (calculated as (prev_open + prev_close) / 2). The allowed indicators do not include computed midpoint values or support arithmetic operations between indicators. While prev_open and prev_close are available, the midpoint calculation and multi-condition logic (opens below midpoint AND closes at or below midpoint) cannot be precisely expressed within the constraint of simple binary comparisons.
translation_notes: This is a two-candle reversal/continuation pattern (Dragonfly Doji variant). Day 1 must be a full white candle (close > open). Day 2 must open below the midpoint of Day 1's body and close at or below that midpoint. The pattern is context-dependent as it can signal both continuation and reversal depending on market regime. Exact midpoint logic is untranslatable with available operators.
